release_notes:
Alpha 5.1.10 - 2026-05-18 - Publish dialog: token field stays editable.

Pablo CRITICAL on 5.1.9: publish failed with HTTP 401 Bad
Credentials because the saved PAT at
~/.marosa_magic/github_token.txt had expired -- and the dialog
gave him NO way to enter a fresh one. The paste-input row was
hidden whenever a token already existed on disk; the only
escape was finding + deleting the file by hand. His words:
"iT DOES NOT ALLOW ME TO CHANGE THE TOKEN - It SHOULD BE
PREFILLED BUT I NEED TO BE ABLE TO MODIFY IT".

5.1.10 makes the dialog match that expectation:
· The paste row is visible at ALL times (token saved or not).
· The field PREFILLS with the saved token (masked echo) so
the user can see / edit / replace it in place.
· The save button flips its label: "💾 Save token" when
nothing is on disk -> "🔁 Replace token" when a token
already exists.
· The green-check status line gains "paste a new token +
Replace to update" so the affordance is discoverable.
· _on_save_token no longer clears the field after writing,
so a follow-up Replace works on the same input (pre-5.1.10
the field was wiped + hidden after every save, leaving
the user with no feedback that the save went through).

Tests: tests/test_1070_qt_5_1_10_publish_token_editable.py
(10 tests pinning both the source-level removal of the
setVisible(False) call and the four functional behaviours).
